text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper titled "Claude 4 sonnet system card" exists with the cited arXiv ID (2401.12168), which actually points to an entirely unrelated paper about SpatialVLM. While a Claude 4 system card document does exist (released by Anthropic in May 2025, covering both Claude Opus 4 and Claude Sonnet 4), the reference as cited has a fabricated arXiv URL, the wrong title format, and was not released in 2025 under that exact title on arXiv or any academic database.
LINK: NONE
